headline: How Investors Are Reacting To UnitedHealth Group (UNH) Earnings Beat, Guidance Hike and Governance Challenge
summary: In April 2026, UnitedHealth Group reported first-quarter 2026 results showing revenue of US$111.72 billion and net income of US$6.28 billion, while also facing a shareholder proposal from The Accountability Board to require an independent Board Chair, which the company’s proxy statement urged investors to vote against. This mix of steady financial performance and a governance challenge highlights how UnitedHealth’s board structure and oversight practices are coming under closer investor...
